summary: Good show with memorable Phil bomb‑filled Satisfaction, recording quality unremarked but presumed decent
review: The concert was enjoyed for its intimate venue and the explosive Phil Lesh “bombs” during a fiery rendition of Satisfaction, which reviewers say alone makes the download worthwhile. No specific technical issues are noted, suggesting an acceptable source, though details on soundboard vs. audience are unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers enjoyed the performance (especially Satisfaction) but gave modest star ratings (4 and 3). Recording quality is not discussed, so it defaults to average; overall rating reflects a solid show with no major flaws.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on clarity, mix, or source; reviewers did not report any audio problems.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Intimate setting praised; not described as a barn‑burner but enjoyable with strong moments, especially the Phil bomb‑laden Satisfaction.

band_member_comments.Phil: Highlighted for his reckless "bombs" during Satisfaction, noted repeatedly by reviewers.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent (keyboardist) is mentioned singing "Baby What You Want Me To Do", eliciting a humorous reaction.
